name: Chameleon
description: Chameleon — In-app product experience platform for tours, tooltips, modals, and launchers with no-code builder and user targeting.

seo.title: Chameleon — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Chameleon: Chameleon — In-app product experience platform for tours, tooltips, modals, and launchers with no-code builder and user targeting.

when_to_use: No-code product tours triggered by user behavior for SaaS onboarding
Contextual tooltips to guide users through complex dashboard features
Modals and launchers for feature announcements and upsell prompts
Targeted in-app checklist for new user activation and setup completion

pros: Polished modal, tooltip, and tour builder
Tours survive app updates without dev work
cons: Pricing climbs quickly past startup tier
Overlap with features from PostHog and LaunchDarkly
Performance impact on heavy apps is noticeable
review.verdict: Strong no-code in-app UX tool for B2B SaaS, but pricey and web-only — evaluate against Userflow first.
review.best_for: B2B SaaS PMs shipping onboarding and feature adoption flows
review.not_for: Mobile apps or teams on tight budgets

developer_experience.reason: JS snippet, no-code builder, some API
